roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring Prior to Release

/CAL: TO JOIN 21008136/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMSWILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO TRAIL 21008136/

/FTRRECORDED/CAL:STATUS OF M99 HOLD IN CASE 21008136/X:M99 HOLD LIFTED AND DEFENDANT IS ON CALENDAR IN DEPT 9, TODAY, 08-19-21 AT 130PM/CONTD:STATUS OF FELONY CASE/DOPC/X:BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET AT 1K/

/CAL:PTD PROGRESS REPORT/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO04-09-21/X:BAIL SET AT $1000/CONTD:PROCESS 1K BW STAY FROM 03-29-21 AND RECEIPT OF PTD PROGRESS REPORT/DOPC/

/CAL: CUSTODY STATUS   ARRAIGNMENT/OR/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/987,2/SAORD/SA2: (STAY OUT OF) FIRECLAY TILE STORE AT 901 BRANNON STREET IN SAN FRANCISCO/X: PEOPLE WAIVE ELIGIBILITY REQUIREMENTS   COURT ORDERS PTD TO DETERMINE TERMS/CONTD PTD PROG RPT/CAL:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/CGTW/PROGPTD:03-29-21/CONTD:PRETRIAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DOP/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE ON 03-29-21/DOP/
/FTRRECORDED/CAL:STATUS OF FELONY CASE/DEF:UNABLE TO COME TO COURT- 4011,5/CONTD:TO JOIN 21008136 IN DEPT 9/
/CAL:PROCESS 1K BW STAY FROM 03-29-21/BWLIFT:03-29-21/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:1000/BWNUM:2ND/X: 3 OF   3  BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/X: DEFENDANT REFUSED COURT/BAIL: 5000/CONT/DOP/
